message:
test(search): add 39 unit tests for query assistance, explain codes, and redaction (br-2tnl.7.13)

Integration test suite covering:
- Structured query hint parsing: canonical fields, aliases, case-insensitive,
  quoted values, colon-in-value, empty values, duplicate fields, unicode
- Typo recovery: Levenshtein suggestions, deterministic ordering, rejection
  of completely unrelated fields
- Zero-result guidance: empty search results across all modes, plain-text
  vs hint-bearing queries, determinism checks across 6 input patterns
- Explain reason codes: snake_case serde stability for all 10 codes,
  summary non-emptiness, total ordering, taxonomy version stability
- Payload-size guards: max_factors_per_stage truncation (20→3),
  zero-max-factors hiding, serialized size bounds (<10KB, <1KB)
- Verbosity controls: Minimal/Standard/Detailed factor detail behavior
- Scope/redaction: ScopeRedacted vs ScopeDenied, selective doc redaction,
  score zeroing, factor clearing, no secret leakage in serialized JSON

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
